arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Newcastle: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Tottenham vs Newcastle Premier League preview, including team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Djed Spence's rise from Tottenham outcast to unlikely saviour - and can he make it permanent?
arts.sum: MATT BARLOW: Having been discarded upon arrival by Antonio Conte and overlooked for 18 months by Ange Postecoglou, Djed Spence was staring at the Tottenham exit this month.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou makes big Djed Spence claim after admitting James Maddison illness issue
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou believes Djed Spence can now push on to become a regular starting player at Tottenham and has said that so many players missed training this week through illness that he almost had to join in. Postecoglou revealed on Friday that an illness bug has hit Spurs on top of the nine already missing players for Saturday's Premier League match with Newcastle, meaning the Tottenham boss is going to have to put together whatever team he can to face Eddie Howe's in-form side.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou: No problem with James Maddison over darts visit after ill call
arts.sum: James Maddison was only well enough to play the final 26 minutes of Tottenham’s 2-2 draw with Wolves.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou reveals why James Maddison didn't start for Tottenham before darts trip
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou said he had no problem with James Maddison attending the World Darts Championship on the evening of Tottenham's 2-2 draw against Wolves having been taken out of the team because of illness

arts.ttl: Arsenal Transfer News Today: Romano ANNOUNCES deal, Lewis-Skelly CONTRACT, Arteta’s Isak BOMB
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano says that the first confirmed transfer for Arsenal in January could be Kieran Tierney signing a deal with Scottish Premiership side Celtic. Arsenal Transfer News Today: Romano ANNOUNCES deal, Lewis-Skelly CONTRACT, Arteta’s Isak BOMB

arts.ttl: 'I have no doubt': Ange Postecoglou says one Tottenham player has seriously 'impressed' Thomas Tuchel
arts.sum: Tuchel will be at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium on Saturday👀

arts.ttl: Son Heung-min decision made as £20m man comes in: Tottenham predicted XI v Newcastle
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur will look to claim their first Premier League win since mid-December when they host Newcastle United in Saturday’s early kick-off. The injury-plagued Lilywhites...

arts.ttl: Why Thomas Tuchel will watch Tottenham Hotspur this weekend as first England assignment is clear
arts.sum: England manager Thomas Tuchel will watch Tottenham Hotspur's Premier League clash with Newcastle United on Saturday afternoon as his first assignment in charge of the Three Lions is now clear. Solanke, who joined the Lilywhites from Premier League rivals Bournemouth in the summer, has hit double digits for goals this season with 10, while he also has five assists to his name across all competitions.

arts.ttl: Tottenham, Newcastle could extend all-time Premier League record with one goal in Saturday's clash
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and Newcastle United could extend an all-time Premier League record with just one goal in Saturday's clash in North London.
